title: DBT inward investment results: 5 July 2024 to 31 March 2025
body: "The inward investment results contain information on the:   number of investment projects landing in the UK number of new jobs created from investment projects landing in the UK number of DBT-supported projects landing in the UK number of new jobs created from DBT-supported projects landing in the UK economic impact of DBT-supported projects landing in the UK   The statistics cover investments landing in the UK between 5 July 2024 and 31 March 2025.  "
